description.value: Aura moderate varies; CL 8th; Slot none; Price 20,800 gp; Weight 5 lbs. DESCRIPTION This iron-shod wood staff allows use of the following spells: Bane (1 charge) Cause fear (1 charge) Command (1 charge) Magic weapon (1 charge) Align weapon (2 charges) CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Staff; Spells align weapon, bane, cause fear, command, magic weapon; Cost 10,400 gp.
